syntaxReference: Cast to double: double y = (double) x;
Integer division and modulo: int q = 7 / 2; // 3, int r = 7 % 2; // 1
Char and String literals: char c = 'Z'; String s = "Hi";
commonPatterns: Accumulator: int sum = 0; for (int x : arr) { sum += x; }
Average with cast: double avg = (double) sum / count;
String building: String full = first + " " + last;
Parse int from String: int n = Integer.parseInt(text);
quickTips: If you need a fractional result, ensure at least one operand is a double.
Use final constants for fixed values to avoid magic numbers and prevent accidental changes.
Prefer descriptive names (e.g., totalSeconds, taxRate) over single letters.
